# OLLIE AI: Launch Script — Production

**Total chars: 1,387 / 1,400** | Generated by Alejandro Bot

---

## HOOK

[Phone dings mid-filming] That text was Ollie — asking if it should order my wife flowers. She's been driving the kids to appointments all day. Director: "Bro, we're filming?" That wasn't staged. Introducing Ollie, the world's first family AI that lives in your text messages. Let me show you how it works.

---

## BODY

Let's say you're a working parent with a family schedule that lives inside your head.

We'll text Ollie: "Catch me up." Ollie reads your last 50 emails, scans your calendar, and flags what matters. Here, it catches the dentist rescheduled Thursday — conflicting with your 9am — and fixes it before you even knew there was a problem. Then Ollie finds what you missed: the school sent a consent form 3 days ago, unread — because you had 47 other things in your inbox. It drafts your reply.

But that's just the start.

We'll tell Ollie: "Plan this week." Right now, Ollie is scanning your calendar, your partner's schedule, and your shopping list. In 60 seconds: meals planned, groceries sent to Instacart, soccer confirmed, Thursday blocked before your parents double-book it.

But Ollie doesn't just sit back and watch. While you sleep, it catches your 7am drop-off conflicting with an 8am call your partner just accepted — and texts you both at 6am with two ways to solve it.

Every other family app waits for you to open it. Ollie texts you first. Families at Anthropic, Apple, and Google agree.

---

## CTA

We're giving away the Family Mental Load Audit. Text Ollie 5 questions — it maps who carries the invisible work in your home and what AI can reclaim. The right parent could use this to recover 30 hours a week and reclaim a six-figure mental load. Comment "Ollie" and I'll DM it. LinkedIn: Comment "Ollie" and I'll send it.

---

## A/B Test Hook (Notification Cascade)

3 emails from your kid's school. 7 meeting invites. Practice moved. Fridge empty. Anniversary tomorrow. This is 6am Tuesday. Introducing Ollie, the world's first family AI that reads your email, manages your calendar, and plans your week — from one text. Let me show you how it works.
